</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">public</span> <span class="nx">class</span> <span class="nx">TestBinarySearch</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="err">@</span><span class="nx">Test</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="err">@</span><span class="nf">DisplayName</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;binarySearchBasic 找到&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">public</span> <span class="nx">void</span> <span class="nf">test1</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span><span class="p">[]</span> <span class="nx">a</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="mi">7</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">13</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">21</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">38</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">44</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">52</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">53</span><span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">7</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">13</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">21</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">38</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">44</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">6</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">52</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">7</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">53</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="err">@</span><span class="nx">Test</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="err">@</span><span class="nf">DisplayName</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;binarySearch 没找到&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">public</span> <span class="nx">void</span> <span class="nf">test2</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span><span class="p">[]</span> <span class="nx">a</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="mi">7</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">13</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">21</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">38</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">44</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">52</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">53</span><span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">15</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nf">assertEquals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nf">binarySearch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nx">a</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">60</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="深入探讨" class="heading-element"><span>深入探讨</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b7%b1%e5%85%a5%e6%8e%a2%e8%ae%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="1-为什么while判断条件是i--j不是i--j" class="heading-element"><span>1. 为什么while判断条件是<code>i &lt;= j</code>，不是<code>i &lt; j</code></span>
 <a href="#1-%e4%b8%ba%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88while%e5%88%a4%e6%96%ad%e6%9d%a1%e4%bb%b6%e6%98%afi--j%e4%b8%8d%e6%98%afi--j" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>测试<br>
修改后<code>i &lt; j</code>，在找7组报错，返回-1</li>
<li>原因<br>
少了一组情况，就是i，j，m相同的情况。<br>
i，j 所指元素也参与比较。若没有=则缺少了i，j所指元素</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="2-m--ij2是否有问题" class="heading-element"><span>2. <code>m = (i+j)/2</code>是否有问题</span>
 <a href="#2-m--ij2%e6%98%af%e5%90%a6%e6%9c%89%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li><strong>测试</strong><br>
当 <code>n = Interger.MAX_VALUE</code>时，<code>m = (i+j)/2</code>在第一个循环中计算数值已经比较大（为<code>Interger.MAX_VALUE - 1</code>），第二次循环中，若缩小左边界 i ，计算结果为负数，无法得到正确结果</li>
<li><strong>原因</strong>
<ol>
<li>在第二次循环中，若缩小左边界 i 则 m 的值超过了Interger的最大值，无法得到正确结果。</li>
<li>为负数的原因主要是JAVA中，<strong>如果超过了正整数的最高位，则要考虑最高位作为符号位</strong>，因此由于计算出的二进制数字最高位表示负数，结果为负数，实际把这个负数转化为二进制后不考虑最高位为符号位则为正确结果的二进制。</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>最高位是否考虑符号位</strong><br>
例： <code>1111_1111</code> 8 bits</p>
<ul>
<li>最高位不考虑符号位： 表示255</li>
<li>最高位考虑符号位：表示-1【JAVA中式这样】</li>
</ul>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li>解决<br>
利用向右移位，把最高位变为0，避免最高位被作为符号位导致的负数。并且可以除以2.<u>【最低位舍去则为除以2】</u>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">m = (i+j) &gt;&gt;&gt; 1;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h3 id="为什么所有条件判断都是小于符号" class="heading-element"><span>为什么所有条件判断都是小于符号<code>&lt;</code></span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%ba%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e6%89%80%e6%9c%89%e6%9d%a1%e4%bb%b6%e5%88%a4%e6%96%ad%e9%83%bd%e6%98%af%e5%b0%8f%e4%ba%8e%e7%ac%a6%e5%8f%b7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>原因<br>
由于数组是升序排列</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="改动版二分查找" class="heading-element"><span>改动版二分查找</span>
 <a href="#%e6%94%b9%e5%8a%a8%e7%89%88%e4%ba%8c%e5%88%86%e6%9f%a5%e6%89%be" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="代码实现-1" class="heading-element"><span>代码实现</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%a3%e7%a0%81%e5%ae%9e%e7%8e%b0-1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"> /*
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * 二分查找改动版
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * Params:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * a-待查很早的升序数组
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * target-待查找的目标
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * Returns:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * 找到则返回索引
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> * 找不到返回-1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> */
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> public static int binarySearchAlternative(int[] a, int target) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> int i = 0, j = a.length; //改动第一处
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> while (i &lt; j) { //改动第二处
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> int m = (i + j) &gt;&gt;&gt; 1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if(target &lt; a[m]) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = m; //改动第三处
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> else if(a[m] &gt; target) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> i = m + 1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> } else {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return m;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return -1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>

item.title: JAVA算法 · 时间复杂度计算
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="时间复杂度" class="heading-element"><span>时间复杂度</span>
 <a href="#%e6%97%b6%e9%97%b4%e5%a4%8d%e6%9d%82%e5%ba%a6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>以二分查找为例</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 线性查找
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">public static int lineSearch(int[] a, int target) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> for(int i = 0; i &lt; a.length; i++){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (a[i] == target) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return i;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return -1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 二分法查找基础版
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> public static int binarySearchBasic(int[] a, int target) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> int i = 0, j = a.length - 1; //指针和初值
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> while (i &lt;= j) { //范围内还有数据
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> // 利用右移，进行除以2操作，并防止把超出int位数的部分作为符号位
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> int m = (i + j) &gt;&gt;&gt; 1; //注意：JAVA里面自动取整，就不用再调用取整函数floor()
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if(target &lt; a[m]) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = m - 1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> } else if (a[m] &lt; target) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> i = m + 1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }else {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return m;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return -1;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="计算步骤" class="heading-element"><span>计算步骤</span>
 <a href="#%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%ad%a5%e9%aa%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>找到最坏执行情况<br>
代码行数执行最多</li>
<li>假设每个语句执行时间一样，计算每个语句执行次数</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="线性查找" class="heading-element"><span>线性查找</span>
 <a href="#%e7%ba%bf%e6%80%a7%e6%9f%a5%e6%89%be" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>最坏情况 —— 没找到target数字</li>
<li>计算每个语句执行次数（假设数组有n个数字</li>
</ol>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: center">代码段</th>
 <th style="text-align: center">执行次数</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">int i = 0</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">1次</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">i &lt; a.length</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">n+1次</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">i++</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">n次</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">a[i] == target</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">n次</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">return -1;</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">1次</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">合计</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">3n+3次</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="二分查找" class="heading-element"><span>二分查找</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8c%e5%88%86%e6%9f%a5%e6%89%be" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>最坏情况 —— 没找到target数字</li>
</ol>
<blockquote>
<p>以右侧没找到为准，右侧没找到更差</p>
</blockquote>
<ol start="2">
<li></li>
</ol>
